de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.proofevent

Class NodeReplacement

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.proofevent.NodeReplacement

  • public class NodeReplacement
extends Object
    Information about a node replacing its parent after a rule application, currently giving information about added and removed formulas

    • Field Summary

    • Constructor Detail

      • NodeReplacement

        public NodeReplacement(Node p_node,
                       Node p_parent,
                       ImmutableList<SequentChangeInfo> p_changes)
        Parameters:
        p_node - the node this object reports about
        p_parent - the parent node
        p_changes - the complete list of changes made to the original node, with the most recent change being the first element of the list
